maintenance_use: Scales recommended service urgency/interval vs baseline; combines age stress and reliability (intervals in miles in app).
notes: Formula: service_factor = (1 + age_years * k_age) / brand_reliability_index; cap e.g. 0.5-2.0; tune k_age (e.g. 0.04). Higher = more frequent service recommended.

maintenance_use: Document tuning in your app; not an OBD PID.
notes: k_age weights how fast aging increases service need; reliability divides baseline interval (reliable brands stretch slightly unreliable tighten). Example baseline_oil_mi = 6214 / service_factor (app uses miles). Brand list: brand_reliability_lookup.csv.
